name: obsidian-ai-cli-runner
description: Run AI CLI tools (Claude Code, aider, etc.) inside Obsidian

scripts.rebuild-pty-arm64: electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch arm64 && cp -r node_modules/node-pty node_modules/node-pty-arm64
scripts.rebuild-pty-x64: electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty --arch x64 && cp -r node_modules/node-pty node_modules/node-pty-x64
